title: jijAcraft Gift Tags with Gold Butterfly: 5x10CM White Paper Tags 100PCS Wedding Labels with String Blank Favour Tag for Gift Wrapping DIY Crafts Wedding Birthday
features: 【Unique Gold Butterfly Design】Features a beautiful, eye-catching gold foil stamped butterfly design, adding a touch of sophistication and romance to any item. The gold foil stamping provides a durable, shiny, and high-end appearance that resists fading and elevates your branding.
【5x10CM Gift Tags】These gold butterfly tags are made of 100% kraft paper, each pack contains 100 paper labels. Each gift tag measures 5x10 cm and comes with two jute strings.

【Blank Gift Labels】Both sides of the gift tag are flat and smooth, and can be easily written with either a ballpoint pen or a felt-tip pen. Write warm blessings on the tag and pair it with unique gold foil butterfly print decoration to make your gift full of uniqueness and tenderness!

【Tags for Gift Wrapping】The shiny gold butterfly detail ensures your tags stand out on clothing, gifts, crafts, or packaging, grabbing attention instantly. You can choose your favorite hang tag style, cut the length of the hanging rope to suit the gift packaging of different occasions.

【Wide Range of Uses】From gift wrapping, birthday parties, to wedding celebrations and holiday decorations, these tags are the perfect fit. They can be used as gift tags to convey heartfelt messages, price tags to display information, or as excellent materials for DIY crafts, unlocking endless creative potential.
